{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032410592190F4850DBAB72055662D"}"},"total":1455},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7064041854517920544","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书总体来说非常好看，内容呢非常甜，女主穿越的非常恰当，内容描写的也非常精细，整篇没有虐文，非常适合喜欢看甜文的大众们看，希望作者在写后文的时候再接再厉。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1644725415,"group_id":"7053260816107179022","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"天生我材必有用，千金散去还复来","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1C0RZG91lF9MnDLA5B532KgWNRzIFS5txB3KaDba6hZ","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d246ce25e1e0471aa09da3bc00f4af79~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776875378&x-signature=QXDEV90N4DsFCH%2BLvj8khnIArCI%3D","user_id":"2603294998665149","user_name":"烟烟细雨"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2603294998665149","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7053260816107179022","book_info":{"abstract":"【1v1双洁穿书重生甜宠】
《一睡觉就能穿越到反派的浴室里》
顾柠柠不小心穿到恶毒女配的身上，
以为是普通的穿书，谁知道能穿越到反派男配浴室是什么奇葩的设定。
楚灏重生回来探寻上辈子死亡的真相，却在无意间发现与上辈子完全不同的顾柠柠。
来到这个世界，顾柠柠害怕把自己弄死的楚灏，却在得知他的身世后，想拯救他。
可为什么这个楚灏跟书里写的不一样！！
为什么这么会撩！！还是个接吻狂魔！动不动就要亲亲！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/47398008ac2bf0ee215b850bbbe5df6d~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"槐夏凸凸","author_id":"","book_id":"7053260816107179022","book_name":"穿书后跟偏执男配谈个恋爱","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f88888","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1926人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":267,"name":"现言脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=267&name=现言脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":29,"name":"总裁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=29&name=总裁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":4,"name":"校园","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=4&name=校园&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":387,"name":"青梅竹马","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=387&name=青梅竹马&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7053655389170041348","read_count":"1926","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"304388"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"146","tags":"现言脑洞,现代言情,校园,总裁,穿越,甜宠,反派,穿书,青梅竹马","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/47398008ac2bf0ee215b850bbbe5df6d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779505161&x-signature=ylhRtLN%2FFCncqB3Tk%2BuV39%2B9IdM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"369025759844701","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3.942089e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032410592190F4850DBAB72055662D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":15,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3942,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":27146},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1644725589,"author_reply_time":1644725611,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7161794809840042788","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"强推！绝对绝对不能错过这本宝藏小说，啊啊啊啊啊啊，真的，男主就是很爱很宠女主，特别的是还很会撩。男主就是一头傲娇腹黑的狼🐺，而女主就是不小心撞入他的领域里的一只猫，还是特别爱炸毛的那种小猫...作者的文笔真的很好，而且男女主的人设真的很讨喜，我是真的很喜欢这类小说，希望作者可以多写写这类的，期待！期待！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1667485398,"group_id":"7053260816107179022","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"希望有人觉得认识我是一件很棒的事情","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+vo684u8KOilebuiXkbfR8AnjQIp50Sp/cbVuZEjG+T","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c601cff1575642f2bacc77ba0a634ba7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776881817&x-signature=lZM907IwHHG%2BZi0VF0V5XmGUhKM%3D","user_id":"2146666256015056","user_name":"W狐狸"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2146666256015056","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7053260816107179022","book_info":{"abstract":"【1v1双洁穿书重生甜宠】
